steps.title: Spot what the finding proves about the practice
steps.content: The passage concludes with a finding that “demonstrates that ______.” That finding is that the practice described in the songs corresponded with clam growth and abundance—despite harvesting pressure. This directly shows the method was effective and worked.

steps.title: Connect the effectiveness to knowledge preservation
steps.content:
Choice D states effective cultivation methods are preserved in Indigenous songs.

The practice described in those songs produced real results—larger, more abundant clams—confirming the knowledge was accurate and effective.

The other three either make unsupported claims, assume facts not established, or overstate what the evidence shows.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
